name: xitter-hermes-agent-zh
description: Interact with X/Twitter 通过 x-cli terminal client using official X API credentials.
intent_triggers: 我需要處理 xitter 相關工作
幫我啟用 xitter 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 xitter

task.description: Natural-language task or instruction for the agent skill.

context_path.description: Optional workspace path or file context for the skill.

examples.intent: Use the xitter skill for this task.

error_codes.1: Skill invocation failed or required context was missing.
